meta.title: ATHAR — AI Automation for Egyptian Businesses
meta.description: We build AI systems that run your business while you sleep. Custom automation for small businesses across Egypt.

hero.subline: We build AI systems that handle the repetitive work — appointments, replies, follow-ups — so you focus on what actually moves the needle.
hero.badge: ✦ No code. No complexity. Just results.

problem.headline: Your time is being eaten alive.
problem.subline: Business owners across Egypt lose hours every day to tasks a machine could do faster and better.

pains.title: Manual Replies
pains.body: You're typing the same message to every client, every day — without ever feeling like you're building something.

pains.title: Appointments & Follow-ups
pains.body: One client forgot. Another needs a reminder. You're stuck in the middle, chasing instead of growing.

pains.title: Scattered Data
pains.body: Your info lives in WhatsApp, Excel, and your head. No system. No clear picture.

solution.headline: AI systems that work for you.
solution.subline: Not tools you buy and forget. A complete system we build, integrate into your workflow, and maintain alongside you.

pillars.title: Conversation Automation
pillars.body: Reply to clients on WhatsApp and email in seconds — around the clock, automatically.

pillars.title: Appointment Management
pillars.body: Booking, confirmation, reminders, cancellations — handled without you touching your phone.

pillars.title: Live Reporting
pillars.body: Know exactly how your business is performing at any moment. Clear data, no noise.

tiers.headline: Choose your level.
tiers.subline: Each tier builds on the last. Start small, scale with confidence.

items.name: ATHAR CORE
items.description: Built for businesses just beginning their AI journey.

items.name: ATHAR FLOW
items.tagline: Run your business while you sleep.
items.description: For growing businesses that need more than one automation running.

items.name: ATHAR ELITE
items.description: For businesses ready to transform how they operate entirely.
features: Custom AI systems built for your business
Full integration with your existing tools

process.headline: 3 steps. That's it.
process.subline: From first conversation to live system — as fast as possible.

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.body: We talk, we understand your business, and we identify exactly where AI will make a real difference.

steps.title: We Build the System
steps.body: We design and build your automation — without disrupting your day-to-day for a minute.

steps.title: You Run. You Grow.
steps.body: Your system goes live. We stay with you to monitor, refine, and scale.

stats.label: Reduction in time spent on routine tasks

testimonials.quote: Before ATHAR, I spent 3 hours a day on WhatsApp replies. Now the system handles it entirely on its own.
testimonials.name: Dr. Mariam Salem

testimonials.quote: Appointments are organized for the first time ever. Clients get reminded, and last-minute cancellations dropped by 60%.
testimonials.name: Ahmed El-Sharif

faq.headline: Got questions?
faq.subline: The questions we always get — answered honestly.

items.q: Do I need to know how to code?
items.a: Not at all. We build everything. Your only job is telling us what you need.
CORE takes 5–7 days. FLOW takes 2–3 weeks. ELITE gets a custom timeline.
We work with clear contracts. You sign off before the final payment — we guarantee your satisfaction first.

items.q: Will it work with my existing tools?
items.a: Most likely yes. We support WhatsApp, email, Google Calendar, and many more. We'll tell you exactly after your consultation.
Always. Every plan includes ongoing support. ELITE gets a dedicated account manager.

footer.tagline: ATHAR — We make your business unforgettable.
